title: utils
description: Controller-family-specific shared definitions for CTAS: the controlled vocabularies (category / modulation / conduction-mode / protection / pin-function / telemetry) and the controller package code. These are owned by CTAS, not PEAS, because no other component family uses them (CTAS follows the CONAS pattern: reuse the universal primitives from https://psma.com/peas/utils.json, own the family-specific enums here). Vocabularies derived from a datasheet survey of mainstream PWM / LLC / PFC / phase-shift / sync-rectifier / digital-PMBus controllers, isolated & non-isolated gate drivers, shunt regulators, voltage references, current-sense & isolated amplifiers, and hot-swap / eFuse controllers (TI, Analog Devices, onsemi, Infineon, ST, Renesas, Power Integrations).

controllerCategory.description: Functional category of a control IC. THE primary selection discriminator (required at datasheetInfo.function.category and at the design seed). One value per part; multi-function parts pick the dominant function. `supervisor` covers power sequencers, voltage monitors, watchdog/reset and OVP-supervisor ICs; `loadSwitch` is a controlled-inrush switch without the current-limit/circuit-breaker of an `eFuse`.
controllerCategory.title: controllerCategory

controllerModulation.description: Modulation / control law implemented by the controller. Determines the small-signal plant order for behavioural simulation. `notApplicable` for parts that do not modulate (references, current-sense amps, plain gate drivers, opto feedback). Note: digital-ness is NOT a modulation value — it is implied by datasheetInfo.digitalInterface.digitalControl; a digital controller still names its underlying law (e.g. peakCurrentMode).
controllerModulation.title: controllerModulation

controllerConductionMode.description: Conduction mode the controller is designed for. `crcm` = critical/transition (boundary) mode.
controllerConductionMode.title: controllerConductionMode

controllerSyncRectification.description: Synchronous-rectification support offered by the controller. `builtIn` drives the SR gate directly; `controlOnly` provides SR timing to an external SR driver; `external` expects a separate SR controller.
controllerSyncRectification.title: controllerSyncRectification

controllerIsolation.description: Position of the controller relative to the converter's isolation barrier.
controllerIsolation.title: controllerIsolation

controllerProtectionKind.description: Built-in protection EVENTS a control IC can detect on its own pins. UVLO is intentionally absent: it is an operating boundary carried richly by datasheetInfo.electrical.uvlo (start/stop/side), not a protections[] row, so it is never double-modelled. Multi-level OCP is expressed as multiple `ocp` rows (distinguished by threshold/responseTime).
controllerProtectionKind.title: controllerProtectionKind

protectionMode.description: Recovery behaviour of a protection event. `warningOnly` flags without acting (a telemetry/PGOOD assertion); `frequencyShift` reduces switching frequency rather than shutting down (LLC capacitive-mode / OLP).
protectionMode.title: protectionMode

telemetryChannel.description: A quantity reported over the digital interface (PMBus / I2C / SPI / AVSBus). PMBus READ_* commands map 1:1 onto these flags, so a separate supported-command list is unnecessary. `voltage` / `current` are output-side unless an input* variant is also present.
telemetryChannel.title: telemetryChannel

controllerPinFunction.description: Canonical function of one pin of a control IC. Vocabulary covers every pin function published by mainstream PWM / LLC / PFC / digital controllers, isolated gate drivers, sync-rectifier controllers, shunt references, current-sense / isolated amplifiers, and PMBus telemetry parts. Used by the slim pin map so a stencil can wire the part into a circuit.
controllerPinFunction.title: controllerPinFunction

packageType.description: Mechanical package code. Open vocabulary using standard JEDEC / EIA / manufacturer designators (SOT23-6, SOIC-8, SOIC-14, MSOP-10, TSSOP-14, VSSOP-8, QFN-16, QFN-24, DFN-10, WSON-8, LQFP-32, TO-220, TO-263, DPAK, BGA, etc.). CTAS-owned because controller packages are IC packages, distinct from the magnetic/capacitor case codes other families use.
packageType.title: packageType
